steps.title: Identify corresponding angles
steps.content: Line $n$ is a transversal crossing parallel lines $r$ and $s$. From the figure, the $162^{\circ}$ angle and the $x^{\circ}$ angle occupy matching positions at the two intersections, so they are corresponding angles.

steps.title: Apply the corresponding angles relationship
steps.content: Corresponding angles formed by a transversal across parallel lines are congruent. Therefore, $$x=162.$$
